description:
Legal record (#33) in a court register/pinqas from a Rabbanite beit din in Cairo (on f. 8v of BL OR 6356). In Hebrew. Location: Cairo. Dated 1 Nisan 5443 AM, which is 1683 CE. 

(Document #33) Engagement agreement between the prospective bride and groom: Perla bt. Aba (אבא) De Qanya (=Di Chania?) and Yiṣḥaq b. Gershon Karo. The wedding is set to take place on the holiday Sukkot. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
